title: Secure Artifact Backend
goal: Implement storage, metadata and signed download minimums in the backend.
allowed_changes: backend/app/routers/artifacts.py; backend/app/schemas/artifacts.py; backend/app/services/artifact_storage.py; backend/app/services/artifact_signing.py; backend/app/main.py include_router only; tests/test_artifacts_contract.py; docs/audit/external-ens-unified-migration-m1b-artifact-implementation/**
forbidden_changes: frontend changes; Docker; auth refactors; migrations without authorization; vendoring external code
done_when: Artifact upload/download/auth/RBAC/audit are passing in tests.

title: Artifact UAT
goal: Validate upload/download/auth/RBAC/audit against the new contract.
allowed_changes: test-only docs and notes; no product code
done_when: Artifact contract test suite and audit notes are green.

title: Chat Bridge Mock
goal: Implement a server-side mock adapter for chat runs and events without provider calls.
allowed_changes: backend-owned adapter files and contract tests
done_when: Mock run/create/event flows are deterministic and secure.

title: RAG MCP Mock
goal: Implement allowlisted RAG adapter behavior without live provider/vector dependencies.
allowed_changes: backend-owned adapter files and contract tests
forbidden_changes: frontend changes; raw MCP exposure; secrets in UI
done_when: Search, collections and audit behavior are deterministic.

title: Designer Mock
goal: Implement jobs/templates mock flows without live provider generation.
allowed_changes: backend-owned adapter files and contract tests
done_when: Job creation/status/download contract is stable and safe.

title: Apoema UI Gate
goal: Decide when to expose new entries in Apoema after backend adapters exist.
allowed_changes: docs-only decision memo; optional allowlisted route wiring
done_when: UI gate is approved only after backend contracts are proven.

title: Authenticated E2E
goal: Run end-to-end validation with storageState outside the repo.
allowed_changes: tests and docs only; no secrets committed
done_when: Authenticated smoke and contract paths pass from Apoema.

title: Final Gates
goal: Run the final pre-push checklist once all adapters are stable.
forbidden_changes: blind push, broad staging, destructive cleanup
done_when: All validation gates pass and the repo stays boundary-clean.
